name: BLT in Bibb Lettuce Cups
recipeIngredient: 6 slices bacon, cooked until crisp and crumbled
24 outer bibb lettuce leaves (about 4 heads), washed and patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, toss together the tomatoes, mozzarella, arugula, bacon, onion, olive oil, and balsamic vinegar.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Spoon the mixture into the lettuce leaves.
4. Serve immediately.
